plan_summary: Define a narrow manual import boundary and prove that its output feeds review packet assembly.
summary: Implemented fixture-based import and evidence capture scaffold for review packet generation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Manual agent result import contract is explicit and versioned.
Imported fixture output can be consumed by review packet assembly.

changed_files.summary: Defines imported agent result evidence mapping and redaction summary fields.
Adds import and review packet scaffold routes.

commands.summary: Control-plane unit tests passed for imported evidence mapping.
Review packet assembly consumed the imported fixture.

risk_notes: Fixture-only ingestion; no live runner, gateway, or GitHub API call is performed.
uncertainty: Prototype fixture only; no runner daemon or webhook integration is claimed.
retry_notes: No retry was required for the fixture import.
rollback_notes: Remove the fixture import route and review packet adapter wiring.
